title: [MTR4] Cityrail Trains
description: Some Retextures For A Fictional British Metro Operator (Feel free to use it)
body:
Some Retextures Of A British Metro Operator Based Off The Tyne and Wear Metro and Merseyrail
With The Following Rolling Stock:
- Class 599 (Metrocar)(Model From Szandor)
- Class 777 (METRO)(Model From Aceth/Ultimate-USA-YT)
